title: Non-Google Traffic Engines — Zero-Budget Distribution Layer
principle: Google alone may not be fast enough with 503 discovered-not-indexed. Build alternative traffic sources that cost $0 and require 0 manual work from Qasem.

bing_webmaster_indexnow.automation_safety: SAFE — sitemap submission is standard practice
bing_webmaster_indexnow.traffic_potential: 5-15% of Google traffic (Bing has ~7% US search share for finance queries)
bing_webmaster_indexnow.action: Check if Bing Webmaster Tools account exists. If yes, submit sitemap. If no, create account (free) and submit.

rss_feed.setup_status: CHECK — need to verify if RSS feed exists
rss_feed.traffic_potential: LOW (feeds primarily for discovery, not direct traffic)
rss_feed.action: Build or verify RSS feed for new pages. Include in site header for auto-discovery.

public_data_hub.automation_safety: SAFE — internal page, no external dependency
public_data_hub.traffic_potential: MEDIUM — data pages can rank independently for 'mortgage affordability table', 'loan payment table', etc.
public_data_hub.action: Build /data hub as required infrastructure (Task 8). Include CSV downloads for journalists.

public_csv_downloads.traffic_potential: LOW-MEDIUM — CSV files can be indexed and linked by data aggregators
public_csv_downloads.action: Generate CSV for each data asset. Link from /data hub pages.

pinterest_pins.setup_status: CHECK — previous Pinterest system was deleted (Phase 15.2). Verify if account still exists.
pinterest_pins.manual_dependency: None if API workflow works. Manual if account needs setup.
pinterest_pins.automation_safety: CAUTION — previous Pinterest crons were deleted for safety. Only re-enable if clean.
pinterest_pins.traffic_potential: LOW — previous Pinterest generated 1 session/7d, 315 views. Not a meaningful traffic source for calculators.
pinterest_pins.risk: LOW if safe. DO NOT automate posting at scale.
pinterest_pins.action: If account exists and is safe: manually pin top 5 data assets with good images. Max 5 pins/week. Do NOT build automated Pinterest cron.

ai_answer_formatting.setup_status: PLANNED — AI answer engine plan (Task 12) defines page structure
ai_answer_formatting.automation_safety: SAFE — just HTML structure, no external service
ai_answer_formatting.traffic_potential: MEDIUM-HIGH — AI platforms (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.) increasingly cite web sources. Well-structured data pages are more likely to be referenced.
ai_answer_formatting.action: Ensure all pages follow AI answer structure: direct answer block, formula block, assumptions table, worked example, caveats. This is already in the template.

internal_popular_calculations_hub.traffic_potential: LOW-MEDIUM — internal navigation pages can rank for broad queries like 'loan payment examples'
internal_popular_calculations_hub.action: Build /popular-calculations or /examples page that links to top database pages. Auto-update with most-viewed pages.

programmatic_share_images.cost: $0 (can use simple HTML-to-image or SVG approach)
programmatic_share_images.traffic_potential: LOW — social shares of calculator pages are rare. More useful for data assets.
programmatic_share_images.action: Generate simple share images for data assets only (not every database page). Include key number + QFINHUB branding.

github_public_data_repo.manual_dependency: One-time repo creation. Auto-update via git.
github_public_data_repo.traffic_potential: LOW — primarily for credibility, not direct traffic
github_public_data_repo.risk: LOW — verify GitHub ToS allows data publishing
github_public_data_repo.action: Create public GitHub repo 'qfinhub-financial-data' with CSVs from data assets. Link from /data hub. Only if safe per GitHub terms.

newsletter_archive_page.cost: $0 (no email sending — just a public page)
newsletter_archive_page.automation_safety: SAFE — static page, no email infrastructure needed
newsletter_archive_page.traffic_potential: LOW — primarily an archive, not a traffic driver
newsletter_archive_page.action: Build /data/archive page listing all data assets chronologically. No email collection, no sending. Just an archive page.

prioritized_action_list.action: Build /data hub with loan + mortgage tables. HIGHEST PRIORITY.
Verify RSS feed exists. Build if not.
Ensure all database pages follow AI answer template.
Check if Bing account exists. Submit sitemap.
Generate share images for data assets.
